title: vibrant experience
description: A performance-focused Vanilla+ modpack with connected textures, glowing ores, optional shaders, and smooth high-FPS gameplay.
body:
# 🌈 Vibrant Experience (Alpha)

***A Performance-Focused Vanilla+ Visual Modpack***

Vibrant Experience enhances Minecraft’s visuals while keeping the vanilla experience smooth, clean, and optimized.

### This modpack focuses on:
* High gameplay performance
* Connected textures & glowing ores
* Dynamic lighting
* Optional shaders support (low → high-end systems)
* has some simple animations on items
* Stability-tested configuration

_Every mod and resource pack was tested individually to ensure good performance and compatibility._


**Designed for players who want a vibrant Vanilla+ experience without sacrificing performance.**


### 📜 Credits & Attributions
* Mods: Huge thanks to the developers of Sodium, Lithium, Iris, and the rest of the all contributors!

* Shaders: Featuring Bliss (by X0nk/Chocapic13), Complementary (by EminGT), and others.

* Resource Packs: Credits to Recolourful Containers GUI + HUD (DARK), Spunky PVP Texture Pack, Fresh Food, and all creators for the amazing visuals.

_All rights and credit go to the original authors. Please support them on their official pages!_


**Install via the Modrinth App or Prism Launcher for the best experience.**

[vibrant rain is a part of it!](https://modrinth.com/project/s8xUPE4Z)
